headline: A Look At Booking Holdings (BKNG) Valuation After Resilient Q1 Results And US$750 Million Debt Offering
summary: Booking Holdings (BKNG) is back in focus after reporting first quarter results that included growth in gross bookings and revenue, while also completing a US$750 million senior notes offering maturing in 2036. See our latest analysis for Booking Holdings. Despite the solid first quarter update and new US$750 million debt issue, momentum in Booking Holdings shares has cooled, with the year to date share price return down 20.51% even as the 5 year total shareholder return sits at 87.52%. This...
